body: PT Metrodata Electronics Tbk has allocated IDR 120 billion for the expansion of its logistics center in Cibitung, Bekasi, which will increase storage capacity by 85% and improve distribution business activities. The company's revenue has grown 12.4% year-on-year to IDR 10.5 trillion in the first half of 2024, driven by its expanding logistics capabilities.
title: Metrodata Electronics to Expand Logistics Centre in Cibitung with IDR 120 Billion Investment

body: PT Sinergi Multi Lestariindo Tbk has secured a IDR 43 billion credit facility to boost its capital expenditure, consisting of an overdraft facility, loan note, and loan certificate financing. The company aims to allocate IDR 350 billion in capital expenditure in 2024 to achieve a revenue target of IDR 420 billion and a net profit target of IDR 100 billion, following a strong Q1 2024 performance with IDR 97 billion in revenue and IDR 27 billion in net profit.
title: PT Sinergi Multi Lestariindo secures IDR 43 billion credit facility to boost capital expenditure.

body: The Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) has suspended transactions of PT Multipolar Technology Tbk (MLPT) due to an unusual rapid price surge, with the stock price rising 50.35% to IDR 4,330 over the past 5 days and 146.27% over the past month. The suspension, effective since September 13, 2024, aims to protect investors and will remain in place until further announcement from the IDX.
title: Indonesia Stock Exchange Suspends Trading of PT Multipolar Technology TBK Due to Unusual Price Surge

body: Indonesia's trade surplus in August 2024 dropped 6.96% year-on-year to USD 2.89 billion, with non-oil and gas commodities contributing a surplus of USD 4.34 billion, while oil and gas saw a deficit of USD 1.44 billion. The country's trade surplus for the January-August 2024 period also decreased by 22.49% year-on-year to USD 18.84 billion, with total exports reaching USD 173.92 billion and total imports reaching USD 155.08 billion.
title: Indonesia's trade surplus drops 6.96% year-on-year to USD 2.89 billion in August 2024.

body: The Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) reached a new record high of 7,824.41, surpassing the 7,800 threshold, with other indices such as LQ45, IDX30, IDX80, and IDXESGL also experiencing gains. The JCI's growth was driven by stocks like PT Chandra Asri Pacific TBK and PT Unilever Indonesia TBK, while others like PT Adaro Energy Indonesia TBK and PT Telkom Indonesia TBK experienced corrections.
title: Jakarta Composite Index Reaches New High of 7,824.41, Led by Gains in Major Stocks.

body: The Indonesian government is set to hold another round of government securities auction next Tuesday, targeting to raise IDR 22 trillion, with 7 series of notes and bonds offered, yielding between 6.5% and 7.12%. Since the beginning of 2024, the government has conducted 16 rounds of auctions, receiving IDR 921.34 trillion in bids and awarding IDR 369.61 trillion.
title: Indonesian Government to Hold Auction for Government Securities Worth IDR 22 Trillion Next Tuesday

body: PT Waskita Toll Road (WTR) has channelled a non-revolving loan facility worth IDR 270 billion to PT Cimanggis Cibitung Tollways (CCT) for refinancing purposes, which is expected to provide added value to WTR as a 35% shareholder of CCT. As of December 31, 2022, CCT's shares were controlled by PT Sarana Multi Infrastruktur (55%), WTR (35%), and PT Bakrie Toll Indonesia and PT Bakrie Brothers Tbk (5% each).
title: PT Waskita Toll Road secures Idr 270 billion loan facility from PT Cimanggis Cibitung Tollways for refinancing purposes.

body: PT Tripar Multivision TBK has acquired 619.42 million shares of PT MNC Digital Entertainment TBK (RAAM) through a private placement, worth IDR 309.71 billion, increasing RAAM's total shares to 6.81 billion. The acquisition aims to expand operations in Indonesia's media entertainment sector, with strategies including synergy in content production, cost efficiency, and shared expertise, following approval from RAAM's extraordinary general meeting of shareholders.
title: MNC Digital Entertainment acquires 619 million shares of RAAM through private placement, expanding media entertainment operations in Indonesia.
